summary: RM: tilize pushes cb_x(Wt), square pops cb_x(1)*Wt pushes cb_xsq(1)*Wt, reduce pops cb_xsq(1)*Wt pushes cb_rms(1), untilize pops cb_rms(1) pushes cb_out(1), writer waits cb_out(1). TILE: square pops cb_in(1)*Wt pushes cb_xsq(1)*Wt, reduce pops cb_xsq(1)*Wt pushes cb_out(1), writer waits cb_out(1). Scaler persistent: reader pushes(1), reduce waits(1), kernel pops(1) at end. All balanced.

After fix: cb_xsq now has Wt pages. TILE path: square pushes Wt tiles to cb_xsq (all fit), reduce pops Wt tiles from cb_xsq, pushes 1 tile to cb_out, writer pops 1. RM path: same but with tilize before and untilize after. All balanced.
